Banner.Description: I am a Full-Stack Engineer with over 4+ years of experience building high-reliability web applications and enterprise systems, with a strong focus on the MedTech domain. On the frontend, I specialize in creating responsive, data-driven interfaces using Angular and reactive patterns. On the backend, I develop secure and high-performance systems using Java and Spring Boot, and have hands-on experience migrating legacy monoliths into Dockerized microservices. My focus is on writing clean, maintainable code while ensuring strict compliance with industry standards and business goals.
AboutMe.Title: About me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: With over 4+ years of experience as a Full-Stack Engineer, I have worked across the full software development lifecycle-from writing unit tests and driving continuous Code Reviews to building scalable backend systems with Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. My journey in Medical Technology has taught me to highly value precision, data security, and system reliability.

I specialize in creating efficient solutions by optimizing database performance, refactoring legacy architecture, and delivering clean, reusable code. My expertise spans building dynamic UIs with Angular as well as developing robust microservices, complemented by experience in Docker containerization and a proven track record of mentoring junior developers.
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
Description: Developing robust backend services using Java 17+, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and JDBC (JdbcTemplate) in the MedTech domain.
Working closely with high-load Oracle databases, writing performant SQL queries, and analyzing execution plans to optimize data processing.
Designing and implementing complex client-side Angular modules featuring Reactive Forms and advanced dynamic validation logic.
Participating in microservices architecture design, ensuring the delivery of clean, modular, maintainable, and highly testable code.
Conducting comprehensive code reviews, reviewing technical solutions, and mentoring junior and trainee developers to improve team code quality.
Utilizing GitLab, TeamCity, SonarQube, Jira, and Postman within the daily CI/CD and agile development workflow.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Full-Stack Software Engineer (Middle / Senior)
Description: This could be your company! I am ready to bring my strong expertise in Java, Spring Boot, and Angular to your team.
I can help build and scale your web applications, design secure RESTful APIs, and modernize legacy systems into efficient microservices.
Ready to optimize your database performance, write clean, maintainable code, and implement reliable frontend solutions using reactive patterns.
Excited to participate in rigorous Code Reviews, share knowledge, and mentor team members to foster technical growth and engineering culture.
Open to discussing how my experience in high-reliability domains can deliver value and align perfectly with your business goals.

FeatureProjects.Title: Projects that I was a part of
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: ISD (Laboratory Information System)
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: An Enterprise-grade Laboratory Information System (LIS) designed to automate clinical laboratory workflows. Contributed as a Fullstack Developer, building robust RESTful APIs and microservices on the backend, and creating reactive, user-friendly interfaces for medical data processing on the frontend.

OtherProjects.Title: More personal projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Spring Auth Starter
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: A ready-to-use Spring Boot authentication library that provides JWT-based login, logout, token refresh, and validation out of the box. Designed as a reusable starter to integrate secure authentication into any Spring Boot project with minimal configuration.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: ng-auth-lib
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: An Angular library that seamlessly integrates with Spring Auth Starter. Provides interceptors, guards, and services for JWT token management, automatic token refresh, and route protection — ready to drop into any Angular project.

Contact.Title: Get in touch!
Contact.Content: I will be happy to receive your contact if you want to talk about new opportunities. Write me, and I will reply as soon as I see your message. Simple one-page design that features a profile letter with basic information about a person.
